'''Angratha''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]].

==History==
Discovered circa [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], Angratha was colonized following the creation of the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] in the years following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]]. When the whole system adopted a policy of isolationism, Angratha followed suit. Eventually signing a treaty with the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], the sector was given a seat in the galactic political body, and accord all the rights as other members worlds. While talks of anti-slavery were strong under the Republic, upon the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] they had dwindled. Angratha thrived under the Empire, supplying most of the region's frozen foods. Remaining independent after the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the sector was not attacked by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], accepting refugees inside its borders. As of [[137 ABY]], the world was enveloped by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Angratha was created for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] book ''[[Instant Adventures]]'', published in [[1996]]. It was later charted on a map of the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
